server/tests/test_validate.py :: test_validate_png_is_valid
def test_validate_png_is_valid() -> None:
    payload = png_bytes(solid_raster(12, 12, 100, 120, 140))
    report = validate_image(payload, "photo.png")
    assert report["valid"] is True
    assert report["decodable"] is True
    assert report["format"] == "png"

server/tests/test_validate.py :: test_validate_tiff_input
def test_validate_tiff_input() -> None:
    payload = tiff_bytes(solid_raster(8, 8, 40, 80, 120))
    report = validate_image(payload, "scan.tiff")
    assert report["valid"] is True
    assert report["format"] == "tiff"

server/tests/test_validate.py :: test_validate_unknown_signature
def test_validate_unknown_signature() -> None:
    report = validate_image(b"not-an-image", "mystery.bin")
    assert report["valid"] is False
    assert report["errors"]

server/tests/test_validate.py :: test_validate_uploaded_image_service_wrapper
def test_validate_uploaded_image_service_wrapper() -> None:
    payload = png_bytes(solid_raster(6, 6, 10, 20, 30))
    report = validate_uploaded_image(payload, "tiny.png")
    assert report["valid"] is True

server/tests/test_validate.py :: test_validate_output_format_webp
def test_validate_output_format_webp() -> None:
    report = validate_output_format("webp")
    assert report["supported"] is True
    assert report["format"] == "webp"

server/tests/test_validate.py :: test_validate_output_format_unknown
def test_validate_output_format_unknown() -> None:
    report = validate_output_format("bmp")
    assert report["supported"] is False
